_comment: Verification gates run before git commit. Set 'blocking' to true per-gate to hard-fail; default is warn-only so existing workflows are not disrupted.

gates.name: secret_scan
gates.description: Detect leaked secrets in staged files
gates.command: git diff --cached --name-only -z | xargs -0 -r grep -l -E 'sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|xox[baprs]-[0-9a-zA-Z-]{10,}' 2>/dev/null | grep -v -E '\.(md|lock|json)$' || true

gates.name: lint_format
gates.command: if [ -f package.json ] && jq -e '.scripts.lint' package.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run lint; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] && command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff check .; else echo 'no linter configured'; fi

gates.name: test_pass
gates.description: Run project test suite if configured
gates.command: if [ -f package.json ] && jq -e '.scripts.test' package.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm test; elif [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then command -v pytest >/dev/null 2>&1 && pytest || echo 'pytest not installed'; else echo 'no tests configured'; fi
